ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (if provided) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user (if provided) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image (if provided) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the user's website (if provided) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address (if provided) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number (if provided) */,
  "verified_account" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "private_account" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is private */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "following" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following another user */,
  "following_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user started following the other user */,
  "unfollowed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user unfollowed the other user (if applicable) */,
  "interaction_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of interactions (e.g., comments, messages) between the user and the followed user */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, follower, influencer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_following_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets by the user */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) by the user */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments by the user */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's content has been shared */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A calculated score based on various engagement metrics */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., post, story, live stream) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the engagement metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user statistics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts made by the user */,
  "story_count" INTEGER /* Number of stories shared by the user */,
  "live_stream_count" INTEGER /* Number of live streams conducted by the user */,
  "average_engagement_rate" TEXT /* Average engagement rate (e.g., likes, comments, shares per post) */,
  "engagement_trend" TEXT /* Trend of user engagement over time (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
